diffCoverage.notes: Two layers touched (zalo + command). command depends on zalo + types; zalo depends on types + zca-rust; no back-edges. types stays zca-rust-free because the credential mapping lives in the zalo layer.

findings.evidence: to_zca_credentials maps types::Credentials into zca_rust::Credentials inside the zalo layer, so zca-rust stays behind the zalo boundary and the forward-only order types → … → zalo → … → command holds with no back-edge from types into zalo.
findings.fix: Keep all zca-rust type mapping inside zalo/ as more endpoints are wrapped.

summary: Cross-layer change (zalo + command) reviewed for layering. command/login -> zalo/login_profile -> zca-rust is forward-only; types remains free of zca-rust because the credential mapping is confined to zalo. No layer back-edges. Approve.
